title: Crafty
description: Some utility recipes to make crafting just that little bit easier.
body:
Currently adds:
- Black dye from coal and charcoal
- Combine yellow and blue to make green dye
- Combine yellow and light blue to make lime dye
- Crimson roots to red dye
- Warped roots to cyan dye
- Put chest in the the middle slot of minecart recipe to make chest minecart
- Put furnace in the the middle slot of minecart recipe to make furnace minecart
- Logs instead of planks to 4 chests
